summary: Comprehensive testing of Sales Order Type Awareness (Warehouse vs Drop-Ship) feature. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified. order_type field works correctly with warehouse default and drop_ship setting. PATCH endpoint validates commitments before allowing drop_ship switch. bc-shipment for drop_ship records without inventory release. bc-invoice for drop_ship only requires shipment. summary returns order_type with appropriate data. reconcile correctly rejects drop_ship. UI shows order type selector, teal drop-ship summary strip, manual line entry for drop-ship, and conditional invoice section.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /sales-orders/{id}/order-type returns 'warehouse' by default
Backend: GET /sales-orders/{id}/order-type returns 'drop_ship' for drop-ship SO
Backend: PATCH /sales-orders/{id}/order-type sets order type to drop_ship (no commitments)
Backend: PATCH /sales-orders/{id}/order-type rejects invalid order_type (422)
Backend: PATCH /sales-orders/{id}/order-type can revert to warehouse
Backend: POST /reconcile-sales-order for drop_ship returns 422
Backend: POST /sales-orders/{id}/bc-shipment for drop_ship records without inventory release (total_released=0, total_recorded>0)
Backend: POST /sales-orders/{id}/bc-shipment for warehouse without commitments returns 404
Backend: POST /sales-orders/{id}/bc-invoice for drop_ship only requires shipment (no commitment checks)
Backend: POST /sales-orders/{id}/bc-invoice for drop_ship without shipment returns 422
Backend: GET /sales-orders/{id}/summary for drop_ship returns order_type='drop_ship', 0 commitments, lines=[]
Backend: GET /sales-orders/{id}/summary for drop_ship shows operational_status (pending/shipped/complete)
Backend: GET /sales-orders/{id}/summary for warehouse returns order_type='warehouse' with commitment data
Backend: PATCH to drop_ship rejected when SO has remaining commitments
Frontend: ShipmentCaptureDialog shows order type selector after loading SO
Frontend: Order type selector shows 'Warehouse' with 'Warehouse inventory' badge for warehouse orders
Frontend: Order type selector shows 'Drop-Ship' with 'No inventory impact' badge for drop-ship orders
Frontend: Drop-ship mode shows teal 'Drop-Ship Order' summary strip
Frontend: Drop-ship mode hides commitment columns table
Frontend: Drop-ship mode shows manual line entry section for shipped items
Frontend: Warehouse mode shows commitment lines table with remaining qty
Frontend: Warehouse mode hides drop-ship specific UI elements
Frontend: Invoice section appears for drop_ship after shipment (Fulfillment Complete shown)
Frontend: Shipment History shows 'drop-ship' badges for drop-ship shipments
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2307-2367: Order type endpoints with proper validation. _get_order_type returns 'warehouse' default. PATCH validates no remaining commitments before allowing drop_ship switch
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2391-2483: bc-shipment endpoint handles warehouse vs drop_ship - releases inventory for warehouse, only records for drop_ship
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2508-2583: bc-invoice endpoint - warehouse requires full release + shipment, drop_ship only requires shipment
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2597-2643: summary endpoint returns order_type field, empty lines for drop_ship, commitment data for warehouse
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2268-2293: reconcile endpoint rejects drop_ship orders (no inventory commitments to reconcile)
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 727-1143: ShipmentCaptureDialog with order type selector, conditional rendering for drop_ship vs warehouse

seed_data_used.drop_ship_so: SO-TEST-DROP-001 (pre-existing drop-ship with shipments and invoices, operational_status=complete)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Order Type Awareness feature fully tested. Backend: GET/PATCH /sales-orders/{id}/order-type manage order type (default: warehouse). Drop-ship orders skip inventory logic in bc-shipment (records only), bc-invoice (only needs shipment), and summary (empty lines). Reconcile rejects drop-ship. Frontend ShipmentCaptureDialog at Lines 727-1143 shows conditional UI based on orderType state - teal summary strip for drop-ship, commitment table for warehouse.

patch_order_type.validation: Rejects drop_ship if remaining committed qty > 0

bc_invoice_drop_ship.behavior: Only requires shipment log (no commitment checks)

reconcile_drop_ship.behavior: Returns 422 - drop-ship has no inventory commitments

dropship_summary.content: Drop-Ship Order, Last Ship, Invoice, operational_status

warehouse_summary.content: Committed, Released, Remaining, Last Ship, operational_status

dropship_lines.content: Manual line entry for Item # and Qty

shipment_lines.content: Commitment table with Ship Qty input
